profiles.oneLiner: Human UGC production and ad workflow software for performance marketing teams.

founders.name: Kennan Frost
founders.bio: Repeat founder and product builder. Icon's own story page says he previously solo-founded Skio and participated in Y Combinator S20.

trackRecord.label: Previous company
trackRecord.value: Solo-founded Skio; outcome, ARR and funding figures are first-party claims and require independent diligence.

trackRecord.label: Builder signal
trackRecord.value: Icon describes him as an engineer and lists prior work at Pinterest, Hulu and Wieden+Kennedy.

trackRecord.label: Public reach
trackRecord.value: Icon links his LinkedIn, X and YouTube profiles from the founder story.

companySignals.label: Commercial product
companySignals.value: Published $399/month entry offer with a three-day free trial and Admaker 2.0 software.

companySignals.label: Customer proof
companySignals.value: Icon publishes 28 named customer stories and claims 288+ brands; the count is first-party until corroborated.

companySignals.label: Funding signal
companySignals.value: Icon publicly names Founders Fund and individual technology leaders among its investors; financing terms remain unverified.

evidence.label: Founder story and public profile links
evidence.note: First-party source explicitly names Kennan Frost as Founder. The relationship was manually reviewed; performance figures remain claims, not audited facts.

evidence.label: Founder LinkedIn URL linked by Icon
evidence.note: URL discovered from Icon's own page. No LinkedIn page content was scraped.

evidence.label: Product and pricing
evidence.note: Current public offer and product workflow; prices and packaging may change.

evidence.label: Published customer stories
evidence.note: Named first-party customer references are useful diligence leads, but the aggregate count is not independently verified.

evidence.label: Published investor roster
evidence.note: First-party investor names; financing amount, instrument and ownership are not established.

openQuestions: Confirm recurring revenue and retention through a connected billing source.
Independently corroborate the Skio outcome and Icon financing terms.
Clarify founder time allocation and current operating team size.

profiles.oneLiner: A Spanish-first operating platform that helps LATAM founders form and manage US LLCs.

founders.name: Ignacio Estevo
founders.bio: Technical co-founder focused on product, software and AI systems. His public profile shows recent hackathon products and technical education.

trackRecord.label: Product execution
trackRecord.value: Public activity includes multiple built hackathon products and awards; outcomes should be reviewed from linked project evidence.

founders.name: Franco Ferreira
founders.bio: Product-minded full-stack engineer and founder. His public profile lists Rely and describes experience building and launching digital products.

trackRecord.label: Founder and builder signal
trackRecord.value: Public profile lists Rely and a portfolio of shipped products and hackathon work.

companySignals.label: Live product
companySignals.value: Rely publishes a working LLC formation, document, compliance and operations workflow with public pricing.

companySignals.label: Paying customers
companySignals.value: 55 unique paying customers, stated by the founder. Stripe verification for the last three months is planned but not connected.

companySignals.label: Customer references
companySignals.value: The public site includes named customer testimonials and dates that can be used as diligence leads.

evidence.label: Founder-provided team roles
evidence.note: Ignacio Estevo identified himself as co-founder/CTO and Franco Ferreira as co-founder/CEO. This is founder confirmation, not government identity verification.

evidence.label: Ignacio Estevo public profile
evidence.note: Public URL and search-visible summary only; no authenticated LinkedIn scraping.

evidence.label: Franco Ferreira public profile
evidence.note: Public URL and search-visible summary only; no authenticated LinkedIn scraping.

evidence.label: Rely product, pricing and customer references
evidence.note: First-party evidence of the live offering and named references; it does not verify revenue or customer totals.

evidence.label: Founder-stated customer count
evidence.note: 55 unique paying customers. Keep labeled as founder-stated until a scoped Stripe aggregate is connected and reviewed.

openQuestions: Connect a read-only Stripe aggregate to verify unique paid customers and recent payment volume.
Add founder GitHub or portfolio ownership proof where the founders choose to disclose it.
Clarify the previously mentioned 15K metric before storing or displaying it.
Confirm fundraising target and use of funds only when the team resumes the pitch work.

profiles.oneLiner: Self-paced business, finance and analytics education for individuals and teams.

founders.name: Kenji Farre
founders.bio: Career Principles lists Kenji Farre on its executive team. Companies House lists him as an active, identity-verified director of Career Principles Ltd.

trackRecord.label: Relevant experience
trackRecord.value: The company biography lists Cornell, Microsoft MVP status and experience at Amazon, Goldman Sachs and PwC; these are first-party biography claims.

trackRecord.label: Corporate role
trackRecord.value: Companies House lists him as an active director appointed in July 2022 and marks identity requirements complete.

companySignals.label: Product breadth
companySignals.value: The official site offers courses in Excel, finance, Power BI, SQL, Python and AI for business.

companySignals.label: Audience reach
companySignals.value: The company claims 50M+ tutorial views; this is useful but not independently verified.

evidence.label: Official company and executive-team page
evidence.note: Supports current executive-team membership and biography, but does not explicitly call Kenji the founder of Career Principles.

evidence.label: UK Companies House officer appointment
evidence.note: Supports an active director relationship and identity-verification status, not the founder title.

evidence.label: Candidate LinkedIn URL from exact-domain contact search
evidence.note: Candidate URL only. No LinkedIn content was scraped and the founder relationship still needs confirmation.

openQuestions: Confirm whether Kenji Farre founded Career Principles or joined as an executive/director.
Identify and confirm any co-founder through first-party or registry evidence.
Verify paid learner, B2B customer, revenue and retention metrics.
